name: Workout
description: Chat-first training log. Tell the agent what you did — "three sets of deadlifts and one hour climbing" — and it updates a structured, editable workout log with n/a fields when details are unknown. Includes strength PRs (e1RM), cardio bests, weekly category volume, per-category stats, and a year-at-a-glance streak heatmap.
author: mobius-os
